channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.114】Visual Studio 代码 1.114
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.114 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.114 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Building with Azure Skills】使用 Azure 技能进行构建
item.description: 【Part 3 of the Azure Skills Plugin series Previously: How to Install the Azure Plugin You've installed the Azure Skills Plugin. The Azure MCP server is running. You have a huge collection of tools and skills at your】Azure 技能插件系列的第 3 部分 以前：如何安装 Azure 插件 您已经安装了 Azure 技能插件。 Azure MCP 服务器正在运行。您拥有大量的工具和技能

item.title: 【Aspire 13.2: Dashboard Gets Smarter Export and Telemetry】Aspire 13.2：仪表板变得更加智能的导出和遥测
item.description: 【Debugging distributed apps is hard. When something goes wrong, the problem could be in any service, and the evidence is scattered across separate log streams, trace collectors, and configuration sources. Aspire makes telemetry a first-class concern by configuring OpenTelemetry by default and collecting all telemetry in the Aspire dashboard.】调试分布式应用程序很困难。当出现问题时，问题可能出现在任何服务中，并且证据分散在单独的日志流、跟踪收集器和配置源中。 Aspire 通过默认配置 OpenTelemetry 并在 Aspire 仪表板中收集所有遥测数据，使遥测成为头等大事。

item.title: 【Visual Studio March Update - Build Your Own Custom Agents】Visual Studio 三月更新 - 构建您自己的自定义代理
item.description: 【This month's Visual Studio update gives you new ways to customize GitHub Copilot. Custom agents allow you to build specialized Copilot agents tailored to your team's workflow, backed by the tools and knowledge sources that matter to your project. Alongside that, agent skills bring reusable instruction sets, and a new find_symbol tool】本月的 Visual Studio 更新为您提供了自定义 GitHub Copilot 的新方法。自定义代理允许您构建适合您团队工作流程的专业 Copilot 代理，并由对您的项目重要的工具和知识源提供支持。除此之外，代理技能还带来了可重用的指令集和新的 find_symbol 工具

item.title: 【Before you check if an update caused your problem, check that it wasn't a problem before the update】在检查更新是否导致您的问题之前，请先检查更新之前是否存在问题
item.description: 【My colleagues over in enterprise product support often get corporate customers who report that "Your latest update broke our system." After studying the problem (which is usually quite laborious because they have to go back and forth with the customer to capture logs and dumps and traces), they eventually conclude that, actually, the system】我在企业产品支持部门的同事经常收到企业客户的报告，“您的最新更新破坏了我们的系统”。在研究了问题之后（这通常是相当费力的，因为他们必须与客户一起来回捕获日志、转储和跟踪），他们最终得出结论，实际上，系统

item.title: 【Azure Developer CLI (azd) - March 2026: Run and Debug AI Agents Locally, GitHub Copilot Integration, & Container App Jobs】Azure 开发人员 CLI (azd) - 2026 年 3 月：本地运行和调试 AI 代理、GitHub Copilot 集成和容器应用作业
item.description: 【The Azure Developer CLI (azd) shipped seven releases in March 2026. Most notably, azd now has a local run-and-debug loop for AI agents, GitHub Copilot–powered project setup, and Container App Jobs deployment. Here's what's in versions 1.2】Azure 开发人员 CLI (azd) 于 2026 年 3 月发布了七个版本。最值得注意的是，azd 现在为 AI 代理、GitHub Copilot 支持的项目设置和容器应用程序作业部署提供了本地运行和调试循环。这是 1.2 版本中的内容

item.title: 【Writing Azure service-related unit tests with Docker using Spring Cloud Azure】使用 Spring Cloud Azure 通过 Docker 编写与 Azure 服务相关的单元测试
item.description: 【In this post, we explore how to write Azure service-related unit tests for Spring Boot projects using Docker and Spring Cloud Azure. What is Spring Cloud Azure? Spring Cloud Azure is an open-source project that makes it easier to use Azure services in Spring applications. For more information about this topic, see the】在这篇文章中，我们将探讨如何使用 Docker 和 Spring Cloud Azure 为 Spring Boot 项目编写与 Azure 服务相关的单元测试。什么是 Spring Cloud Azure？ Spring Cloud Azure 是一个开源项目，可以让您更轻松地在 Spring 应用程序中使用 Azure 服务。有关此主题的更多信息，请参阅

item.title: 【A question about the maximimum number of values in a registry key raises questions about the question】关于注册表项中值的最大数量的问题引发了有关该问题的疑问
item.description: 【A customer wanted to know the maximum number of values that can be stored in a single registry key. They found that they ran into problems when they reached a certain number of values, which was well over a quarter million. Okay, wait a second. Why are you adding over a quarter million values to a registry key!? The customer】客户想知道单个注册表项中可以存储的最大值数。他们发现，当达到一定数量的值（远远超过 25 万）时，就会遇到问题。好的，等一下。为什么要向注册表项添加超过 25 万个值！？客户

item.title: 【What if a dialog wants to intercept its own message loop?】如果对话框想要拦截自己的消息循环怎么办？
item.description: 【So far, we've been looking at how a dialog box owner can customize the dialog message loop. But what about the dialog itself? Can the dialog customize its own dialog message loop? Sure. It just has to steal the messages from its owner. The dialog box can subclass its owner and grab the WM_ENTER­IDLE mess】到目前为止，我们一直在研究对话框所有者如何自定义对话框消息循环。但是对话框本身呢？对话框可以自定义自己的对话框消息循环吗？当然。它只需要窃取其所有者的消息即可。对话框可以子类化它的所有者并抓住 WM_ENTERIDLE 的混乱

item.title: 【Azure SDK Release (March 2026)】Azure SDK 版本（2026 年 3 月）
item.description: 【Thank you for your interest in the new Azure SDKs! We release new features, improvements, and bug fixes every month. Subscribe to our Azure SDK Blog RSS Feed to get notified when a new release is available. You can find links to packages, code, and docs on our】感谢您对新的 Azure SDK 的兴趣！我们每月都会发布新功能、改进和错误修复。订阅我们的 Azure SDK 博客 RSS 源，以便在新版本可用时收到通知。您可以在我们的网站上找到包、代码和文档的链接
